claim_scope: Per-assignment vertex-circle quotient certificates for the same review-pending 184 n=9 exact-four frontier assignments. These certificates are replay data for audit only; they do not complete independent review, do not prove n=9, do not prove Erdos Problem #97, and do not produce a counterexample.
